---
name: Template request
about: Suggest a new template for the toolkit
title: "Template request: "
labels: template
assignees: ""
---

## Template idea

Describe the template you want to add.

## Why this template is useful

Explain what workflow this template supports.

## Target users

Who would use this template?

- Researchers
- Clinicians
- Science communicators
- Medical content teams
- Students
- Product education teams
- Other

## Proposed sections

List possible sections for the template.

- Basic information
- Target audience
- Communication goal
- Suggested structure
- Risk wording review
- Safer wording examples
- Final output
- Notes

## Related files

Mention any related files.

Example:

- `templates/paper-to-video-script.md`
- `templates/medical-content-checklist.md`

## Notes

Add any additional context here.
